metadata.description: Project name prefix for resource naming
Tags to apply to all resources
Administrator email for alerts and notifications
Enable Azure Defender and advanced security features
Deploy AKS cluster (optional; off by default in prod unless overridden)
Deploy Azure Machine Learning workspace module (defaults on for all environments)
Deploy Azure Bastion + a private-subnet Windows jump VM for PE/DNS/RBAC troubleshooting
Admin username for the jump VM Windows OS profile
Windows jump VM admin password (required when deployJumpBox is true)
Enable private networking posture (disable public Key Vault access)
Enable metric alerts (set to false if alerts fail to deploy)
PostgreSQL SKU name (e.g., Standard_B1ms for Burstable, Standard_D2s_v3 for GeneralPurpose)
Key Vault name for secret storage (currently unused but reserved for future use)
Data subnet ID for private endpoints
Virtual Network ID for Private DNS Zone linking (optional for dev, required for prod)
ML subnet ID (optional) to allow Azure ML compute access to storage/Data Lake
Enable private networking posture regardless of environment

variables.storageVirtualNetworkRules: [if(empty(parameters('mlSubnetId')), createArray(createObject('id', parameters('subnetId'), 'action', 'Allow')), createArray(createObject('id', parameters('subnetId'), 'action', 'Allow'), createObject('id', parameters('mlSubnetId'), 'action', 'Allow')))]

properties.network: [if(and(and(variables('isProduction'), not(empty(parameters('vnetId')))), not(empty(parameters('subnetId')))), createObject('publicNetworkAccess', variables('postgresPublicNetworkAccess'), 'delegatedSubnetResourceId', parameters('subnetId'), 'privateDnsZoneArmResourceId', resourceId('Microsoft.Network/privateDnsZones', 'privatelink.postgres.database.azure.com')), createObject('publicNetworkAccess', variables('postgresPublicNetworkAccess')))]

metadata.description: Kubernetes version (e.g., 1.27.10). If not specified, deployment script will query for latest supported non-LTS version.
Log Analytics Workspace resource ID (required for omsagent addon)
Availability zones for node pools (empty array if region does not support zones, e.g., eastus2)
Subnet resource ID for AML compute (must be in same VNet as the Storage Account when storage has VNet restrictions)
Enable GPU compute cluster for deep learning workloads (may require additional vCPU quota)

properties.description: Machine Learning workspace for credit scoring models and agentic AI

metadata.description: Subnet ID for the jump VM NIC
Windows admin password for jump VM
When false, no Bastion/jump resources are created (outputs remain empty strings).
